text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I had to win... But this...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her clenched fists tremble slightly. This losing
streak seems to be taking a toll on her.
choice_data_list: This isn't the time to be feeling down!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her clenched fists tremble slightly. This losing
streak seems to be taking a toll on her.
choice_data_list: This isn't the time to be feeling down!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You blindly believing in me doesn't help.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
But... there also isn't any point in me being
depressed.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I have to take a deeper look at myself and find
out what I'm missing.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Along with that, I'll need to rethink my training
routine.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Right. Let me know if you have any ideas.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I work with Admire Vega to devise a new training
routine.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I have to think about what I can do to win, which
means thinking back and finding the problems
I've had in past races.
choice_data_list: We can figure that out together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega and I go over past races in
preparation for her next one.
